projectDescription: AI Growth Ops workspace provisioned from jira-marketing-agents.

issueTypes.name: AI Growth Request
issueTypes.description: General intake for a growth idea or ask that needs AI triage before it becomes executable work.

issueTypes.name: Creative Request
issueTypes.description: Request to draft creative variants (copy/assets) for a channel. AI drafts only; claims-scanned and routed to review.

issueTypes.name: Experiment
issueTypes.description: A single test with a hypothesis, metric, guardrails, and a decision rule.

issueTypes.name: Segmentation Request
issueTypes.description: Request to define a target audience/segment as a structured targeting spec.

issueTypes.name: Personalization Journey
issueTypes.description: A full lifecycle/journey artifact for a segment: stages, channels, behavior triggers, sequence, fallbacks, tracking, and approvals.

issueTypes.name: Employer Launch
issueTypes.description: Workback plan for launching to an employer/partner with readiness scoring, blockers, phases, QA checklist.

issueTypes.name: Campaign
issueTypes.description: A multi-touch outreach plan (draft only — no send). Includes channels, cadence, suppression checks, tracking, and approval gates.

issueTypes.name: Dashboard Request
issueTypes.description: Request for an analytics dashboard or reporting view spec.

issueTypes.name: Signup Funnel Issue
issueTypes.description: A funnel-friction or signup defect to analyze and convert into a product-ready remediation ticket.

issueTypes.name: Research Brief
issueTypes.description: A qualitative research / objection-mining synthesis: themes, frequency, segments, de-identified quotes, conversion impact.

issueTypes.name: Claims Review
issueTypes.description: A health/clinical claims review item. Human Compliance reviewer required; AI may flag but never approves.

issueTypes.name: Decision Memo
issueTypes.description: A decision-support artifact tying a recommendation to evidence and a required decision.

issueTypes.name: Positioning Update
issueTypes.description: A product positioning/messaging update: value propositions, proof requirements, differentiators, objection matrix.

issueTypes.name: Bug
issueTypes.description: An engineering/tracking defect — including analytics/tracking instrumentation gaps.

customFields.name: Segment
customFields.description: AIGO: Target audience segment for this issue.

customFields.name: Primary Metric
customFields.description: AIGO: Primary success metric (signups, CAC, activation rate, etc.).

customFields.name: Claims Risk
customFields.description: AIGO: Health/clinical claims risk level: Low, Medium, High, Prohibited.

customFields.name: Experiment ID
customFields.description: AIGO: Unique identifier for this experiment (e.g., EXP-2026-001).

customFields.name: Workflow Area
customFields.description: AIGO: Triage routing area (Targeting, Creative, Experiment, Employer, Funnel, Content, Research, Platform).

customFields.name: Priority Score
customFields.description: AIGO: Numeric triage priority score (0–100) from the Growth Triage Agent.
